subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from this most exalted Station, which hath been raised up for the Lord of Names. Rejoice thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک المظلوم من هذا المقام الاعلی الذی بنی لمالک الاسماء ان افرح
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @thankfulness; gratitude
